name: ABB PSIRT RSS
notes: Vendor PSIRT feed for ABB industrial/medical devices. Distinct from abb-alerts-html (HTML table, disabled) already in sources.json.

name: Abuse.ch URLhaus Recent URLs
notes: Public JSON API returning recently-added malicious URLs. No API key required for basic queries. Useful for threat intel enrichment.

name: BioWorld Digital Health RSS
notes: RSS feed focused on digital health industry news including software, connected devices, and regulatory issues.

name: Check Point Research RSS
notes: Security research blog. Covers healthcare ransomware campaigns and OT/IoT vulnerabilities periodically. Needs keyword filter.

name: Claroty Blog RSS
notes: Claroty blog RSS (distinct from claroty-team82 disclosure dashboard already in sources.json). Covers healthcare OT/IoMT research and threat reports.

name: Compliance Junction Cybersecurity RSS
notes: Compliance-focused security blog with healthcare regulatory coverage (HIPAA, HITECH). Needs keyword filter.

name: CVEfeed RSS
notes: Aggregated CVE feed across NVD, vendor advisories. High volume — needs keyword filter for medical/device/healthcare terms.

name: Cyber Security Hub – Attacks RSS
notes: General attacks category news. Occasionally covers hospital ransomware incidents. Needs aggressive keyword filter.

name: Cyber Security Hub – Malware RSS
notes: General malware category news. Occasionally covers healthcare-targeting malware. Needs aggressive keyword filter.

name: Dark Reading All RSS
notes: High-volume general security news feed. Covers healthcare incidents and medical device security. Needs keyword filter to avoid noise.

name: eCrimeLabs Metasploit CVE Feed
notes: JSON feed of CVEs with known Metasploit exploit modules — useful for exploitability signal. No key required.

name: EPSS Exploit Prediction Scoring System Daily CSV
notes: Daily CSV of EPSS scores for all CVEs. Useful dataset for prioritization. Note: vuln_sources.txt points to https://www.first.org/epss/data (landing page) — actual CSV is at epss.cyentia.com. High value for scoring pipeline.

name: Fierce Healthcare RSS
notes: Healthcare industry news publication. Covers hospital cybersecurity incidents, breaches, and regulatory actions. High signal-to-noise.

name: Mandiant (FireEye) Blog RSS
notes: Threat research blog. Covers nation-state targeting of healthcare and critical infrastructure. Needs keyword filter. Note: feed URL may have moved post-Google acquisition.

name: Infosec Institute Malware Analysis RSS
notes: General malware analysis articles. Infrequent healthcare coverage. Needs keyword filter.

name: Infosec Institute Threat Intelligence RSS
notes: General threat intelligence articles. Occasional healthcare coverage. Needs keyword filter.

name: Krebs on Security RSS
notes: Investigative security journalism. Frequently covers healthcare breaches, medical device security, and hospital ransomware. Needs keyword filter for high-value subset.

name: openFDA Device Adverse Events API
notes: openFDA device adverse event reports filtered for software/cybersecurity. Distinct from openfda-device-recalls already in sources.json. No API key required.

name: SecLists.org RSS
notes: Aggregates multiple security mailing lists (Full Disclosure, BugTraq, etc.). High noise, but captures zero-day disclosures. Needs aggressive keyword filter.

name: Talos Intelligence RSS
notes: Cisco Talos threat research. Covers healthcare-targeting malware and vulnerability disclosures. Needs keyword filter.

name: Tenable Newest Plugins RSS
notes: Feed of newest Tenable Nessus plugins — high signal for newly-scannable CVEs. Needs keyword filter for medical device/healthcare terms.

name: Threatpost RSS
notes: CAUTION: Threatpost ceased operations in late 2023 — feed may be defunct. Should verify before enabling. If live, covers general security news including healthcare. Needs keyword filter.

name: WIRED Security RSS
notes: General tech/security journalism. Occasional in-depth healthcare cybersecurity coverage. Needs keyword filter to avoid noise.
